name: university-application-skill
description: Multiple-skill university application system with a canonical router, Plugin-owned programme identity catalogues, confirmed applicant evidence, source-backed research, writing, submission, and visa-readiness routes.

interface.shortDescription: Plan source-backed university applications and admissions writing workflows.
interface.longDescription: University Application Skill routes multilingual admissions intent through a canonical index into focused workflows for official programme research, hard requirement audits, confirmed-evidence materials checks, interactive SOP and personal-statement planning, submission readiness, student visa readiness, and explicit programme-data maintenance. Its curated programme catalogue stores official-source identity records only, with requirements explicitly uncollected. Outputs default to English, admission-probability prediction is prohibited, and hard requirements remain tied to official provenance.
defaultPrompt: Build a source-backed shortlist for my target field.
Check the hard requirements for this programme.
Help me plan my personal statement with confirmed evidence before drafting.
